name: REGIONAL HEALTH PROPERTIES, INC
summary: Regional Health Properties, Inc. is a Georgia-based healthcare company that owns, operates, and invests in healthcare real estate and operating businesses focused on long-term care, senior housing, and pharmacy services. It operates skilled nursing and senior housing communities, leases facilities to third-party operators under triple-net lease arrangements, and provides retail and institutional pharmacy services and durable medical equipment through a pharmacy business in Crowley, Louisiana acquired via the SunLink merger.

products.name: Skilled Nursing Care
products.description: Sub-acute and post-acute skilled nursing care, intermediate nursing care, and rehabilitative therapy at owned and operated facilities.

products.name: Senior Housing Services
products.description: Senior living, memory care, Alzheimer's and dementia care services at owned and operated communities.

products.name: Retail Pharmacy Services
products.description: Retail pharmacy services provided through the Crowley, Louisiana pharmacy acquired in the SunLink merger.

products.name: Institutional Pharmacy Services
products.description: Institutional pharmacy services serving long-term care and senior services settings.

products.name: Durable Medical Equipment
products.description: Durable medical equipment provided through the pharmacy business in Crowley, Louisiana.

products.name: Healthcare Real Estate Leasing
products.description: Triple-net lease arrangements for skilled nursing and senior housing facilities leased to third-party operators.

partnerships.description: Merger completed in August 2025; SunLink merged into Regional Health, adding pharmacy operations and other healthcare assets.
